text.value: Supressed messages file not found
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'expansion-params.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
Wrong Display Name 'FRANCE' for urn:iso:std:iso:3166#FR. Valid display is 'France (la)' (fr) (for the language(s) 'fr')
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
This property has only a code ('isMedicationReconciliation') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('isCurrentMedication') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem

Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/hl7.fhir.fr.medication/hl7.fhir.fr.medication/igSource/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-medication-ingredient-strength-codes.json - the canonical URL (https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/medication/CodeSystem/medication-ingredient-strength-codes) does not match the URL (http://hl7.org/fhir/CodeSystem/medication-ingredientstrength). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match
CodeSystem.description: minimum required = 1, but only found 0 (from http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/shareablecodesystem|4.0.1)
Wrong Display Name 'FRANCE' for urn:iso:std:iso:3166#FR. Valid display is 'France (la)' (fr) (for the language(s) 'fr')
The nominated WG 'phx' means that the publisher should be 'HL7 International / Pharmacy' but 'Interop'Santé' was found
The nominated WG 'phx' means that the contact url should be 'http://www.hl7.org/Special/committees/medication' but it was not found

Most code systems defined in HL7 IGs will need to move to THO later during the process. Consider giving this code system a THO URL now (See https://confluence.hl7.org/display/TSMG/Terminology+Play+Book, and/or talk to TSMG)
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.title is mandatory, but it is not present
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.description is mandatory, but it is not present
URL Mismatch https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/medication/CodeSystem/medication-ingredient-strength-codes vs http://hl7.org/fhir/CodeSystem/medication-ingredientstrength

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/event-basedOn v5.3.0 is not allowed to be used at this point (this element is [MedicationDispense]; allowed for this version = e:Condition, e:ChargeItem, e:ClinicalImpression, e:Composition, e:Consent, e:Coverage, e:EpisodeOfCare, e:ExplanationOfBenefit, e:FamilyMemberHistory, e:ImmunizationEvaluation, e:MedicationStatement, e:PaymentNotice, e:PaymentReconciliation)
